title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Institutes of Management Act, 2017. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1. 31st January, 2018, vide notification No. S.O. 149(E), dated 11th January, 2018, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
